meaning: adj.意大利风格的,意大利化的v.有意大利风格
examples: The clearing out of disused workshops laid bare thousands of Italianate glazed tiles.
This Italianate guesthouse is a good reason to step off the free Staten Island ferry and explore the city's "forgotten borough".
The town is picturesque, with a frothy, Italianate feel, and sits on the eastern shore of Lake Wörthersee, the warmest and largest alpine lake in Europe.
The Foundation Building's arcaded Italianate design by Frederick Petersen was the last word in 19th-century high style.
The ownership of four listed buildings, including eye-catching Italianate towers, could be transferred to Leeds City council.
